title: INTEREX EAR MUFFS
shortDescription: EU slotted Unique DROMEX connector that fits all hard hats. Large twin point mounted cups with soft foam cushions. Easy to attach & detatch with spring loaded arms
description: EU slotted Unique DROMEX connector that fits all hard hats. Large twin point mounted cups with soft foam cushions. Easy to attach & detatch with spring loaded arms

features: EU slotted Unique DROMEX connector that fits all hard hats
Large twin point mounted cups with soft foam cushions
